meta.title: #BeADeepLearner like Aleksandr, Niranjan, I-Chiao, Matt and Yudhiesh
meta.description: Looking to grow your skills and build a career in AI? Join 1 million+ learners and #BeADeepLearner with the Deep Learning Specialization, a foundational online program by machine learning pioneer Andrew Ng. Read how learners like Aleksandr, Niranjan, I-Chiao, Matt and Yudhiesh took the next step in their AI journey: https://www.deeplearning.ai/program/deep-learning-specialization/?utm_source=youtube&utm_medium=social&utm_campaign=dls-jan21&course_id=dls-2
